delivery.raw: オンライン同期型+非同期型

summary: Risk assessment is essential to control health hazard in workplaces and general environment. Methods for Toxicological assessment and risk control using those data will be also discussed. Students will participate to the toxicologic experiments using various methods.
aims: Risk assessment is essential to control health hazard in workplaces and general environment. Methods for Toxicological assessment and risk control using those data will be also discussed. Students will participate to the toxicologic experiments using various methods.
goals: Understanding the overview of risk assessment and risk control.
Understanding the Toxic Gases & other air-borne toxicants
Able to explain methods of toxicity assessment.

plan.text:
1.Overview of Risk Assessment and Risk control
2.Toxicology of metals
3.Chemicals
4.Organic solvents
5.Toxic Gases & other air-borne toxicants
6.Pesticides
7.Methods for toxicology assessment
他
開講時期未定。

textbooks:
LaDou J. Current Occupational & Environmental Medicine, fourth edition. McGraw Hill.2004.
Levy B et al. Occupational and Environmental Health: Recognizing and Preventing Disease and Injury, Fifth Edition. Lippincott Williams & Wilkins. 2006.
prereq: Risk assessment is essential to control health hazard in workplaces and general environment. Methods for Toxicological assessment and risk control using those data will be also discussed. Students will participate to the toxicologic experiments using various methods.
prep: 自己学習およびレポート作成

officeHour.name: 菅沼成文

keywords: リスクコミュニケーション
